_meta.description: Default catalog of corporate low-AI-penetration use cases, grounded in 2025-2026 enterprise adoption data (McKinsey State of AI 2025, Menlo State of AI in Healthcare 2025, Wolters Kluwer Future Ready Lawyer 2026, FTI/Relativity General Counsel Report 2026, Conning AI in Insurance 2025, Roots State of AI Adoption in Insurance 2025, Wharton-GBK 2025, Deloitte State of AI 2026). Difficulty maps to ~3000 ELO max. Token multipliers come from realistic per-unit token math (input+output, including any retrieval context). WTP is gross willingness-to-pay per million tokens, anchored to value of professional time displaced.

use_cases.name: Ambient clinical scribe
use_cases.scale_hint: Providers enabled x daily encounters x transcript+SOAP-note tokens; documentation can't wait.

scale_kind.label: Enabled clinicians
scale_kind.formula: providers x encounters/day x (transcript + SOAP-note tokens)

use_cases.name: M&A contract due diligence
use_cases.scale_hint: Contracts/day x clause-extraction depth; spikes during deals, otherwise steady redline review.

scale_kind.label: Contracts reviewed
scale_kind.model_note: Highly bursty in practice; calculator should treat the value as a smoothed daily average over a deal year.
scale_kind.formula: contracts/day x (full text + extracted issues + redline rationale)

use_cases.name: Insurance claims FNOL triage
use_cases.scale_hint: FNOL claims/day x (form + photos + adjuster notes) x decision token; customer-facing latency matters.

scale_kind.label: FNOL claims
scale_kind.formula: claims/day x (intake form + photo descriptions + policy excerpt + triage decision)

use_cases.name: Commercial insurance underwriting
use_cases.scale_hint: Submissions/day x submission-package length; only ~14% market penetration today, projected ~70% by 2028.

scale_kind.label: Underwriting submissions
scale_kind.formula: submissions/day x (broker package + loss runs + risk enrichment + underwriter memo)

use_cases.name: AML / KYC enhanced due diligence
use_cases.scale_hint: Cases/day x adverse-media-and-sanctions context; large banks burn ~10% of headcount on this manually.

scale_kind.label: EDD cases
scale_kind.formula: cases/day x (KYC profile + adverse-media excerpts + sanctions hits + decision memo)

use_cases.name: Patent prior-art search
use_cases.scale_hint: Searches/day x deep-corpus retrieval; very low penetration outside top-tier IP firms.

scale_kind.label: Prior-art searches
scale_kind.formula: searches/day x (claims under review + retrieved patent excerpts + analyst report)

use_cases.name: 100% call QA / voice-of-customer
use_cases.scale_hint: Calls/day x transcript length; legacy QA samples only 1-5% of calls, AI lets you score them all.

scale_kind.label: Calls analyzed
scale_kind.formula: calls/day x (transcript + scorecard rubric + qa output)

use_cases.name: Field service technician copilot
use_cases.scale_hint: Technicians enabled x lookups/day x manual-context tokens; bursty around equipment faults.

scale_kind.label: Technicians enabled
scale_kind.formula: technicians x lookups/day x (service-manual context + fault description + step-by-step guidance)

use_cases.name: Pharmacovigilance ICSR triage
use_cases.scale_hint: Adverse-event reports/day x narrative + medical coding; volumes set by global ICSR submission cadence.

scale_kind.label: ICSRs processed
scale_kind.formula: ICSRs/day x (case narrative + product info + MedDRA coding + regulator-ready summary)

use_cases.name: Equity research / 10-K synthesis
use_cases.scale_hint: Analyses/day x full-filing context; a single 10-K plus comparable filings is the dominant cost driver.

scale_kind.label: Research analyses
scale_kind.formula: analyses/day x (10-K + transcripts + peers + analyst memo)

use_cases.name: Marketing content localization (brand-quality)
use_cases.scale_hint: Asset-language pairs/day x copy length; latent demand is huge once per-token cost falls below human MTPE.

scale_kind.label: Localized assets
scale_kind.formula: asset-language pairs/day x (source copy + glossary + style-guide + localized output)

use_cases.name: Internal IT / HR helpdesk RAG
use_cases.scale_hint: Tickets/day x knowledge-base context per ticket; widely piloted, but only ~10% scaled in production.

scale_kind.label: Helpdesk tickets
scale_kind.formula: tickets/day x (KB context + ticket + draft response)

use_cases.name: ESG / sustainability data extraction
use_cases.scale_hint: Supplier disclosures + sustainability docs/day x long-form context; ~70-80% of Scope 3 still unmeasured.

scale_kind.label: ESG documents processed
scale_kind.formula: documents/day x (supplier disclosure + emissions data + extraction output)

use_cases.name: Corporate tax research copilot
use_cases.scale_hint: Queries/day x tax-code retrieval; high difficulty per query, modest volume.

scale_kind.label: Tax research queries
scale_kind.formula: queries/day x (tax-code excerpts + ruling history + memo + citations)

use_cases.name: AP invoice three-way match
use_cases.scale_hint: Invoices/day x (PO + GRN + invoice text); ~37% of CFO finance functions adopting today.

scale_kind.label: Invoices processed
scale_kind.formula: invoices/day x (invoice + PO + receipt + extraction + exception classification)
